who: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–10 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire integration. We streamline the onboarding process instead of manual onboarding processes with email reminders and document handling.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire integration.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about onboarding workflows
Send DMs to HR managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try Document signature management and Onboarding checklist for new hires on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
